condition: selected equipment has internal dimensions and cargo length/width/height exceeds any applicable internal dimension
confidence_impact: block until different equipment or special approval

condition: gross cargo weight including packaging, pallets, dunnage and securing material exceeds reference payload
confidence_impact: block or require different equipment/weight split

condition: cargo requires temperature control and setpoint/range is missing
_source: authored; reefer type from DCSA/carrier specs

condition: temperature controlled cargo selected with non-reefer equipment
bulk liquid cargo selected with tank equipment but commodity compatibility/cleaning/DG status missing
confidence_impact: block readiness report from green status

condition: cargo requires open-top/flat-rack/breakbulk and lashing plan or carrier OOG approval missing
shipment volume is below 15 CBM or near 10-18 CBM threshold
confidence_impact: planning recommendation only, not a hard gate

condition: LCL requested but package/booking size approaches carrier-specific limits
confidence_impact: cap confidence to 80 until carrier limit confirmed

condition: selected equipment requires port capability not present in SEA-C, e.g., RoRo without RoRo facility, heavy lift without lift capability
